title: bromus rigens var. gussonei
intro: Bromus rigens var. gussonei, also known as California Brome or Gussone's Brome, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, and can be used to treat colds, coughs, and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in poultices and salves to aid in wound healing.
